# מאגר פסקי דין מובנים ומסוכמים (AI-Analyzed Israeli Supreme Court Judgments)

> Comprehensive database of Israeli Supreme Court & High Court of Justice (Bagatz/בגץ) judgments
> with AI-generated plain-language summaries, legal analysis, and topic tagging.
> Content is in Hebrew. Updated multiple times daily with new judgments.

## What This Site Contains

Each judgment page includes:
- Case number, judgment date, panel of judges
- AI-generated plain-language summary (in Hebrew)
- One-sentence claim description and court decision outcome
- Breakdown of legal arguments and petitioner claims
- Cross-references to cited precedents and related cases
- Topic classification and tags
- Full original judgment text

## Key Pages

- [Latest Judgments](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/index.html): Most recently published judgments with summaries
- [Monthly Archives](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/sitemap_index.html): All judgments organized by month
- [Topic Index](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/topics/index.html): Judgments grouped by legal topic
- [About](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/about): About this project
- [FAQ](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Methodology](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/methodology): How judgments are analyzed

## Data Structure

Each judgment has structured metadata:
- `case_number`: Official case number (e.g., "1234/25")
- `judgment_date`: Date of the court ruling
- `case_type`: Type of legal proceeding (e.g., Bagatz petition, criminal appeal)
- `topic`: AI-classified topic category
- `tags`: Relevant legal keywords
- `decision`: Court outcome (accepted/rejected/partial)
- `judges`: Panel of judges with majority/minority indication
- `claim_in_one_sentence`: Brief description of the petition
- `detailed_summary`: Plain-language summary of the ruling
- `implication`: Broader legal implications
- `precedents`: Referenced prior rulings

## Machine-Readable

- [sitemap.xml](https://israeli-court-rulings.github.io/sitemap.xml): Full URL list with modification dates
- Each judgment page contains Schema.org JSON-LD structured data
